The @nx/nest plugin provides various migrations to help you migrate to newer versions of nest projects within your Nx workspace.
Below is a complete reference for all available migrations.

## 21.2.x

### 21.2.0-beta.2-package-updates
**Version**: 21.2.0-beta.2


#### Packages

The following packages will be updated:

| Name | Version | Always add to `package.json`
|---------|----------|---------|
| `nest` | `^11.0.0` | Updated only
| `@nestjs/schematics` | `^11.0.0` | Updated only
